title: Jönköping Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Jönköping with a Z-Score of -4.03. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Jönköping are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The humidity level is at 78%, and the wind speed is moderate at 8.3 km/h. 
 The HDD value of 15.1 GG indicates a high demand for heating, while the CDD value of 0.0 GG shows no need for cooling.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this cold snap.
